hero.title: Pavan Kalyan Goud Koppula
hero.subtitle: Full Stack Developer & AI Researcher
hero.description: Java Full Stack Developer focused on building scalable microservices, efficient backend systems, and AI-driven applications.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Get to know me
paragraphs: Hi there! I'm Pavan Kalyan Goud Koppula, I have experience working with Java, Spring Boot, React, Kafka, REST APIs, cloud technologies, and distributed systems to develop scalable and production-ready applications.I enjoy solving complex problems, optimizing performance, and building systems that are both reliable and maintainable.
I bring a blend of technical expertise from roles at LTIMindtree, Neonq, and Wipro, where I optimized microservices and improved system performance by up to 25%.
Beyond coding, I am an award-winning researcher in sentiment analysis and social networks, with publications recognized for excellence in the field.
Tech Stack: Java, Spring Boot, Microservices, React, Angular, Kafka, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, AWS, Docker, CI/CD, AI/ML

projects.title: Flowmap-cli
projects.description: Codebase Visualization CLI published on npm for mapping file dependencies. Visualize your codebase as an interactive flow graph. Understand file dependencies, function calls, and project structure at a glance — without reading a single line of code.

projects.title: NexusGraph STEM System
projects.description: AI research graph builder providing STEM reasoning using LLMs and semantic search.

projects.title: Sprint Tab
projects.description: Private local workspace for sprint pages, clips, notes, and fast in-browser search. SprintTab is a privacy-first, local-only workspace designed for researchers, students, and power users who need to organize information without the clutter.

projects.title: Spring Boot Kafka Microservices Example
projects.description: A microservices-based project demonstrating event-driven communication between order, product, and inventory services using Kafka.
projects.technologies: Java / Spring Boot / Apache Kafka / MySQL / Docker Compose

projects.title: Emotion Detection Music Player
projects.description: An intelligent application that detects user emotions through facial expressions to automatically curate and play matching music playlists.
projects.technologies: Python / Deep Learning (CNN) / OpenCV / TensorFlow/Keras / Tkinter/PyQt.

projects.title: Custom JPA Repository Example
projects.description: A technical implementation demonstrating how to extend standard Spring Data JPA functionality with custom repository logic and complex queries.
projects.technologies: Java / Spring Boot / Spring Data JPA / Hibernate / H2 Database / Gradle.

points: Contributed to university-led AI research in sentiment analysis, resulting in an IEMTRONICS publication (Best Paper Award).
Engineered a React + TypeScript frontend, improving UI performance by 40%.
Mentored 100+ students in Java, Python, and Web Technologies.
Optimized Java Full Stack microservice modules, accelerating deployment cycles by 20% and improving overall team productivity by 15%.
Collaborated with senior developers on client projects, increasing team productivity by 15% through revised Agile workflows (Scrum).
Streamlined Java Full Stack development processes, accelerating deployment by 20% and addressing 30% of critical system bugs to improve stability.
Developed Spring Boot based microservices and REST APIs, improving backend performance by 25% and resolving 40% of reported service-related bugs.
Integrated Apache Kafka and implemented asynchronous processing to enable event-driven communication, improving scalability and reducing API response time by 22%.
Optimized JPA queries and refactored legacy services to enhance performance and maintainability across microservice modules.
Collaborated with QA and documented Akka Distributed Framework architecture recommendations, reducing post-release defects by 15% and preparing systems for scalable design.
Gained hands-on experience in Java full-stack development, contributing to key projects in web application design and database management.

Contributed to Java full-stack development using Spring Boot, REST APIs, relational databases, Service Discovery (Eureka), API Gateways, and Redis, supporting delivery of 3+ modules and reducing API latency by 25%.
Developed a capstone end-to-end application from design to deployment, improving workflow efficiency by 30% while collaborating with a team of 5+ developers and senior mentors.
